Most state exhibited similar, trend.

Gingerbread scones those things that really overlooked.
mean, I'll first person admit that I've never been scone person.
know they make great on-the-go breakfast busy days, always thought they would taste little boring.
Then, made these Gingerbread Scones holiday-themed brunch blown away.
couldn't have been more wrong!
These delightful breakfast pastries light, soft, tender.
mention that they're full festive flavor, thanks molasses gingerbread spices.
also feel pretty good about eating these tasty treats.
were able make them without adding processed sugar, they taste sweet satisfying just like your favorite coffee shop treats.
Even with swapping some healthy ingredients (like Greek yogurt, skim milk, coconut sugar) these pastries bake with crisp exterior moist, tender crumb inside.
they're perfectly portion-sized, too.
That's always good thing around holidays when need control sweet-tooth cravings.
Like said, gingerbread often gets overlooked this time year, thanks more-popular flavors Pumpkin Spice Lattes pecan pie.
People still make gingerbread houses Christmas, don't think people baking flavors gingerbread which shame!
It's time change that making these Gingerbread Scones friends family.
They'll hooked after first bite, just like
Originally, people made gingerbread preserve ginger during Medieval European times.
make cakes sweeter more edible, people started heavily flavoring cakes with molasses.
This dark, sticky substance gives rich slightly smoky flavor cake, along with punch nutrition.
Blackstrap molasses full vitamins minerals, too, like iron, vitamin selenium, magnesium.
These days, it's also popular sweetener those with diabetes because helps stabilize blood sugar!
Eventually, gingerbread cakes turned into cookies, muffins, pies, more.
They're most commonly found crackers build gingerbread houses during holidays, recent surge products making spicy cake trendy again.
We're pretty happy about that, especially after eating these Gingerbread Scones.
Almost good scones topped with sugary glaze.
It's usually sinfully sweet because it's little more than powdered sugar milk.
wanted capture spirit glaze without putting anyone into diabetic shock.
Luckily, Greek yogurt makes perfect substitute!
time whip tangy yogurt together with maple syrup vanilla extract, will completely transformed.
will know used yogurt.
have hard time finding plain Greek yogurt, feel free swap-in flavored varieties.
find neutral flavors that will well with Gingerbread Scone, though, like vanilla, honey, coconut flavors.
large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, coconut sugar, ginger, cinnamon, cloves.
Note: cups floor, then little time until makes cookie dough like consistency.
Grate butter grater into flour with your hands until mixture resembles lumpy, sand.
Gently molasses, yogurt, milk.
Once mixture comes together, turn dough onto floured work surface gently knead using your hands until dough comes together.
Form dough into large circle about 1-inch deep.
circle into equal slices.
Place slices prepared baking sheet bake minutes, until lightly browned outside.
toothpick inserted into center scone should come clean.
Meanwhile, make drizzle whisking together remaining tablespoon Greek yogurt, maple syrup, vanilla extract small bowl.
Transfer mixture pastry bag.
Allow scones cool minutes before drizzling glaze over scones.
